steps.title: Identify the structure requiring completion
steps.content: The phrase is “respondents were more likely ____.” After a linking verb and adjective, a specific verb form is needed.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive rule
steps.content:
Adjectives expressing likelihood require an infinitive (to + base verb) to complete them. 'To eat' correctly forms 'were more likely to eat.' The other options use past, future progressive, or participle forms, violating the infinitive requirement.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
